title: Dispatcher: enforce handoff_notes for non-code agent completions
handoff_notes: Restructured validateStageCompletion() in task-dispatcher.mjs: handoff_notes check now runs before the isCodeTask early return, so all agents (coach, researcher, health, engineer) must provide handoff_notes. blockedBy changed from 'engineer:missing-handoff' to 'agent:missing-handoff'. Validated with dry-run (exit 0).
